zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell於1124年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓時，他的父親Aubrey II de Vere60歲，母親Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare30歲。他於1149年與Matilda Furnell在英國艾可卡素 丁加姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1194年12月26日在英國諾薩普頓史爾特維爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell于1124年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾拉普斯頓时，他的父亲Aubrey II de Vere60岁，母亲Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare30岁。他于1149年与Matilda Furnell在英国艾可卡素 丁加姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1194年12月26日在英国諾薩普頓史爾特維爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell was born in 1124, in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Aubrey II de Vere, was 60 and his mother, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, was 30. He married Matilda Furnell in 1149, in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 26 December 1194, in Twywell, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell est né en 1124, à Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Aubrey II de Vere, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Furnell en 1149, à Castle Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 décembre 1194, à Twywell, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell 1124 in Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aubrey II de Vere 60 und seine Mutter Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare 30. Er hat 1149 in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England Matilda Furnell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Dezember 1194 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Twywell, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell è nato il nel 1124 nel Thrapston, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Aubrey II de Vere, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Furnell nel 1149, nel Castle Hedingham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 dicembre 1194, nel Twywell, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywellが1124年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスラプストンで生まれた時，父Aubrey II de Vereは60歳，母Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clareは30歳であった。1149年にイギリスエセックスカストル ヘディンガムでMatilda Furnellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1194年12月26日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアトウイウエルで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell(이)가 1124년 영국 노르섬프토실르 스라프스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aubrey II de Vere(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1149년 영국 에세스 카스틀 헤딩함에서 Matilda Furnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1194년 12월 26일 영국 노르섬프토실르 트w이웰에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell nasceu em 1124, em Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Aubrey II de Vere, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Furnell em 1149, em Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de dezembro de 1194, em Twywell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell родился в 1124 г. в местности трапстон, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Aubrey II de Vere было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Furnell в 1149 г. в местности кастл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 26 декабря 1194 г. в местности твивелл, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Vere Lord of Twywell nació en 1124, en Thrapston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Aubrey II de Vere, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Adeliza FitzGilbert de Clare, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Matilda Furnell en 1149, en Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de diciembre de 1194, en Twywell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
